CustomField.description: When enabled, allows users to create Recurring Donations through the Gift Entry form in addition to one-time gifts. Disabled by default. Requires both Gift Entry and Enhanced Recurring Donations to be enabled. When enabled, the Gift Entry form displays Recurring Donation fields so donors can set up recurring giving commitments during gift entry.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Allow Recurring Donations to be created through Gift Entry forms. Requires Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.label: Enable Recurring Donations in Gift Entry
